name: Yukkai Jang Kuk (Beef Stew)
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Flank steak, cut into thin slices
1 t Sesame seeds, roasted and ground
recipeInstructions:
1. Cover the meat with water in a pot, bring to a boil.
2. Reduce heat and simmer for about 45 minutes to an hour or until very tender. Remove the meat, let it cool, and shred using two forks. Set aside the broth.
3. In a separate pan, combine the sliced green onions, crushed garlic, and soy sauce. Add enough water to make 3/4 cup of broth per serving. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for about 8 minutes.
4. Add the shredded meat and rice to the pot. Mix well and let it cook for another 5 minutes.
5. In a small bowl, mix the sesame oil, roasted sesame seeds, sugar, black pepper, and cayenne pepper until combined.
6. Stir the sauce mixture into the stew and continue cooking for about 2 more minutes until the sauce thickens.
7. Traditionally served with plain white rice, kimchi, and steamed vegetables.
